entry.title: New: Bill 67, CD1 (2024) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE TO CHANGE THE WAILUKU-KAHULUI COMMUNITY PLAN LAND USE DESIGNATION FROM HEAVY INDUSTRIAL TO BUSINESS/COMMERCIAL FOR 6.842 ACRES IN KAHULUI, MAUI, HAWAIʻI, IDENTIFIED AS TAX MAP KEYS (2) 3-7-002:020 (POR.) AND (2) 3-7-002:027 (QUEEN KAʻAHUMANU CENTER), AND TO AMEND THE TEXT OF THE WAILUKU-KAHULUI COMMUNITY PLAN (2002), AS AMENDED"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
